# Evidence Manifest

<!-- ForgeFlow evidence contract. Generated by execute at completion. Read by review, ship stages. -->
<!-- "완료 선언은 증거가 아니다, 완료는 계약이다" — every gate must be grounded in observable evidence. -->
<!-- Write prose in the user's primary language. Preserve canonical labels, enum values, commands, paths in English. -->

## Task Reference
<!-- task-id and brief.md objective -->

## Completion Verdict
<!-- overall: PASS | FAIL | PARTIAL -->
<!-- A FAIL or PARTIAL verdict means execution is not complete. Review must note what's missing. -->

## Verification Gates

| Gate | Command | Result | Evidence |
|------|---------|--------|----------|
| <!-- build/lint/type_check/test/scope_boundary_check --> | <!-- actual command run --> | <!-- PASS \| FAIL \| skip --> | <!-- output snippet or ref --> |

## Scope Boundary

- **Planned Files**: <!-- from brief.md scope_files -->
- **Actually Modified**: <!-- from git diff --name-only -->
- **Boundary Status**: <!-- PASS | WARN files=<list> | FAIL -->
- **Out-of-scope Files**: <!-- none, or list with justification -->

## Changed Files Summary

<!-- path — one-line change description — lines changed -->

## Failed Gates & Corrective Actions

<!-- For each FAIL: what failed, why, what was done to fix it, what should change next time -->
<!-- If no failures: "none" -->

### <!-- Gate name -->

- **Failure**: <!-- what happened -->
- **Root Cause**: <!-- why -->
- **Corrective Action**: <!-- what was done -->
- **Next Execution Condition**: <!-- what should change to prevent recurrence -->

## Metrics

- **LOC Changed**: <!-- +/- lines -->
- **Files Modified**: <!-- count -->
- **Retry Count**: <!-- total retries across gates -->
- **Max File LOC**: <!-- largest file, flag if >300 -->

## Evidence Contract Statement

<!-- Execute must fill: -->
<!-- "이 evidence manifest는 run-ledger.md와 implementation-notes.md의 증거를 기반으로 작성되었으며, -->
<!-- 모든 verification gate의 결과는 실제 명령 실행으로 확인되었습니다." -->

## Small Route Minimal Format

small route에서는 최소 포맷 사용:

```markdown
# Evidence Manifest

## Task Reference
<!-- task-id -->

## Completion Verdict
<!-- PASS | FAIL -->

## Verification Gates

| Gate | Command | Result | Evidence |
|------|---------|--------|----------|

## Scope Boundary
- **Planned Files**:
- **Actually Modified**:
- **Boundary Status**: PASS

## Failed Gates & Corrective Actions
none

## Metrics
- **LOC Changed**: 0
- **Files Modified**: 0
- **Retry Count**: 0
- **Max File LOC**: 0

## Evidence Contract Statement
<!-- filled by execute -->
```
